attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_SLEHR_ORG_MP)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_SALHRY_OR_MP.MAP_ID_SEQ, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_SALHRY_OR_MP.ERP_SALES_HIERARCHY_LEVEL_1, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_SALHRY_OR_MP.ERP_SALES_HIERARCHY_LEVEL_2, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_SALHRY_OR_MP.ERP_SALES_HIERARCHY_LEVEL_3, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_SALHRY_OR_MP.ERP_SALES_HIERARCHY_LEVEL_4, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_SALHRY_OR_MP.ERP_SALES_HIERARCHY_LEVEL_5, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_SALHRY_OR_MP.ERP_SALES_HIERARCHY_LEVEL_6, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_SALHRY_OR_MP.NODE_SALES_HIERARCHY_LEVEL_1, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_SALHRY_OR_MP.NODE_SALES_HIERARCHY_LEVEL_2, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_SALHRY_OR_MP.NODE_SALES_HIERARCHY_LEVEL_3, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_SALHRY_OR_MP.NODE_SALES_HIERARCHY_LEVEL_4, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_SALHRY_OR_MP.NODE_SALES_HIERARCHY_LEVEL_5, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_SALHRY_OR_MP.NODE_SALES_HIERARCHY_LEVEL_6, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_SALHRY_OR_MP.VERSION_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_SALHRY_OR_MP.VERSION_NUMBER, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_SALHRY_OR_MP.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_SALHRY_OR_MP.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_SALHRY_OR_MP.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_SALHRY_OR_MP.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_SALHRY_OR_MP.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_SALHRY_OR_MP.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_SALHRY_OR_MP.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_SALHRY_OR_MP.PRJ_OWNING_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_SALHRY_OR_MP.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_SALHRY_OR_MP.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_SALHRY_OR_MP.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_SALHRY_OR_MP.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_SALHRY_OR_MP STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_SALHRY_OR_MP,
(
select MAP_ID_SEQ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_SALHRY_OR_MP
minus
select MAP_ID_SEQ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_SALHRY_OR_MP
) ACM
where 
 ACM.MAP_ID_SEQ = STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_SALHRY_OR_MP.MAP_ID_SEQ and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ASF_SALHRY_OR_MP.REFRESH_DATETIME
